chapter_title: Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
text: In the case of a conflict between this subchapter and other law, including Chapters 502 (Registration of Vehicles) and 551A (Off-highway Vehicles) , this subchapter controls.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 551. Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
##### § 551.457 — Conflicts

In the case of a conflict between this subchapter and other law, including Chapters 502 (Registration of Vehicles) and 551A (Off-highway Vehicles) , this subchapter controls.

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1233 (H.B.1548), Sec. 23, eff. June 14, 2019.*

subsections.text: In the case of a conflict between this subchapter and other law, including Chapters 502 (Registration of Vehicles) and 551A (Off-highway Vehicles) , this subchapter controls.
